maxCategoryComplexity.description: Restricts categories shown in level select to adjust details and cognitive load. 1: Simple (Arabic, Animals, Geometric), 2: Medium (1 + Florals, Gardens), 3: Full (all categories).

zoomLevelsCount.description: Number of zoom levels available to the user. Lower values restrict zooming in to fine details, increasing coloring difficulty. Range 1 (no zoom) to 5 (full zoom).
